# Sarthak Sabharwal

> Senior Business Analyst with a decade of enterprise delivery across banking,
> finance, and technology consulting in India and Australia. Currently leading
> AI governance for a live enterprise pilot, and founder of Nambik AI, an
> independent AI consultancy.

Currently a Senior Specialist – Business Analyst at LTM (formerly LTIMindtree),
leading business analysis for Colonial First State's superannuation wrap
platform transition. Led the CFS Edge Adviser AI programme through a
successfully completed Phase 1 pilot — scoped to a select group of
licensees and practices, covering AI prompt scope, compliance guardrails,
and cross-functional governance across Product, Risk, Compliance, Change,
and FNZ. The programme is now expanding to the full CFS Edge adviser base.
Also sole Business Analyst for "Small Changes," a continuous-improvement
initiative delivering small, high-impact fixes for advisers, operations,
and product teams outside the standard quarterly release cycle. Founder of
Nambik AI, an early-stage AI consultancy — its first engagement a
production inbound AI voice agent for a print industry client — and
independently built a RAG-powered learning application on the Anthropic
API. Certified Scrum Product Owner (CSPO). Based in Melbourne, Australia.

## Career Journey
- [Career Timeline](/journey.md): Chronological narrative from SAP ABAP
  developer (Accenture, 2013) through enterprise BA roles (ANZ, LTM/CFS)
  to AI governance leadership today.
- [About](/about.md): Background, working philosophy, and approach to
  responsible AI adoption.

## Certifications & Skills
- Certified Scrum Product Owner (CSPO)
- Outskill AI Accelerator (14-day intensive, hackathon capstone)
- Outskill AI Catalyst Program (6-month practitioner program, in progress —
  RAG systems, AI agent architecture, MCP integration, voice agents)
- Core skills: business analysis (BRD development, stakeholder management,
  AI governance & prompt scope), Agile/Scrum, JIRA, Confluence, AEM, GCP,
  SAP ABAP, SQL, Tableau, Power BI, RAG architecture, Anthropic API

## Case Studies & Projects
- [CFS Edge Adviser AI — Governing Enterprise AI Adoption](/projects/cfs-edge-ai.md):
  Led BA and governance for a pilot scoped to select licensees and
  practices, now expanding to the full CFS Edge adviser base.
- [Nambik AI — Founding an Independent AI Consultancy](/projects/nambik-ai.md):
  Founded Nambik AI and delivered its first client engagement — a live
  24/7 inbound AI voice agent for a print industry client — using Retell AI,
  ElevenLabs, and n8n.
- [AI Digital Mentor — RAG-Powered Learning Application](/projects/ai-digital-mentor.md):
  Built a Retrieval-Augmented Generation app on the Anthropic API to answer
  concept questions from course material.
